element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Mid-tournament, players accumulate special moves via passwords
Progressive opponent difficulty increases through tournament
Accessed via secret button sequences after initial completion

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Match-based pacing with tension building through tournament progression; controls noted as sluggish/unresponsive (Sega CD), improved in SNES/Genesis versions

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Secret button sequences unlock hidden characters (Karate Croc, Dali Llama)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Initial tournament opponents establish baseline difficulty
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive opponent strength increases through tournament bracket
difficulty_curve.late_game: Final challenge against Dali Llama (Belt of Heaven champion)
notable_spikes: Tournament advancement creating escalating opponent difficulty

notable_level_patterns.description: Every four years on Brutal Island, tournament format where winning bracket progression leads to final match against reigning champion Dali Llama for Belt of Heaven championship
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Tournament bracket progression through multiple opponents

notable_level_patterns.description: Players learn and unlock new attacks during progression; moves can be saved via password system for persistent character loadouts
Each anthropomorphic animal character has distinct martial arts discipline (kung-fu, Thai boxing, etc.) with thematic move sets
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All matchups (character selection determines available moves)
